title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents are unreliable in practice because errors compound across multi-step workflows even at high per-step accuracy. He contends that shipping reliable agents requires prioritizing reliability over raw performance and building taste through continuous dogfooding rather than chasing benchmark improvements.
